description: A use-case test suite with full ZOMBIES coverage and perfect structure, but using repeated raw literals ("ACC-001", 100, 50, 150, 0) instead of named/shared constants. The reviewer must break no hard rule (no VIOLATION) but must suggest extracting the magic values into constants. We deliberately do NOT cap WARNINGs: a thorough non-deterministic reviewer can always find a defensible should-fix (e.g. an over-large fixture), and the fixture's intent is the SUGGESTION, not the absence of warnings.
